transcript.Body:
@gitclaw /help e2e 20260529T205411Z

Live commands-report E2E.

Hidden commands report body token: GITCLAW_COMMANDS_REPORT_E2E_20260529T205411Z
This should produce a deterministic command catalog report without a model call.

## GitClaw Commands Report

Generated without a model call.

- repository: `AnandChowdhary/gitclaw`
- issue: `#70`
- trigger_prefix: `@gitclaw`
- commands: `15`
- aliases: `7`
- local_cli_helpers: `12`
- run_mode: `read-only`
- issue_title_sha256_12: `bffa75ab0b05`

This report lists GitClaw's deterministic slash commands. Issue bodies, comments, config bodies, prompts, and backup payloads are not included.

### Slash Commands
- `/backup` model=`gitclaw/backup` category=`backup` aliases=`/backups` - Show expected backup branch paths for the current issue.
- `/channels` model=`gitclaw/channels` category=`channels` aliases=`/channel` - Audit channel bridge settings and workflow-dispatch ingress.
- `/config` model=`gitclaw/config` category=`control-plane` aliases=`/configuration` - Show effective config, labels, prompt budgets, commands, and workflows.
- `/context` model=`gitclaw/context` category=`context` aliases=`none` - Show loaded context documents and deterministic tool output metadata.
- `/doctor` model=`gitclaw/doctor` category=`health` aliases=`/health` - Run a body-free health check with skill, soul, and tool validation rollups.
- `/help` model=`gitclaw/commands` category=`control-plane` aliases=`/commands` - List deterministic GitClaw slash commands, aliases, and local CLI helpers.
- `/memory` model=`gitclaw/memory` category=`memory` aliases=`/memories` - Audit long-term memory and dated memory note metadata.
- `/models` model=`gitclaw/models` category=`model` aliases=`/model` - Show model provider, endpoint, token source, and retry policy.
- `/policy` model=`gitclaw/policy` category=`policy` aliases=`none` - Show preflight, actor trust, write-intent, labels, and workflow permissions.
- `/prompt` model=`gitclaw/prompt` category=`prompt` aliases=`none` - Show prompt budget, truncation, context, skill, and tool-output metadata.
- `/proactive` model=`gitclaw/proactive` category=`proactive` aliases=`none` - Audit proactive prompt files and scheduled workflow metadata.
- `/session` model=`gitclaw/session` category=`session` aliases=`none` - Show reconstructed transcript counts, markers, trust, and hashes.
- `/skills` model=`gitclaw/skills` category=`skills` aliases=`none` - List local skill metadata, selection state, and validation findings.
- `/soul` model=`gitclaw/soul` category=`soul` aliases=`none` - Audit high-authority context files and soul validation findings.
- `/tools` model=`gitclaw/tools` category=`tools` aliases=`none` - Audit deterministic tool contracts, active outputs, and validation findings.

### Local CLI Helpers
- `gitclaw backup verify` command=`/backup`
- `gitclaw backup manifest` command=`/backup`
- `gitclaw backup stats` command=`/backup`
- `gitclaw backup export-jsonl` command=`/backup`
- `gitclaw backup restore-plan` command=`/backup`
- `gitclaw doctor` command=`/doctor`
- `gitclaw commands` command=`/help`
- `gitclaw proactive init` command=`/proactive`
- `gitclaw proactive enqueue` command=`/proactive`
- `gitclaw skills validate` command=`/skills`
- `gitclaw soul validate` command=`/soul`
- `gitclaw tools validate` command=`/tools`
